'''thobasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eyeopening|eyeopening]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eyeopening|eyeopening]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thobasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobasithi|thobasithi]] || [[word:thobasiji|thobasiji]] || [[word:thobasishi|thobasishi]] || [[word:thobasiki|thobasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobasuthuthu|thobasuthuthu]] || [[word:thobasujuju|thobasujuju]] || [[word:thobasushushu|thobasushushu]] || [[word:thobasukuku|thobasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobasuthu|thobasuthu]] || [[word:thobasuju|thobasuju]] || [[word:thobasushu|thobasushu]] || [[word:thobasuku|thobasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobasufthuf|thobasufthuf]] || [[word:thobasufjuf|thobasufjuf]] || [[word:thobasufshuf|thobasufshuf]] || [[word:thobasufkuf|thobasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobasethe|thobasethe]] || [[word:thobaseje|thobaseje]] || [[word:thobaseshe|thobaseshe]] || [[word:thobaseke|thobaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobasothotho|thobasothotho]] || [[word:thobasojojo|thobasojojo]] || [[word:thobasoshosho|thobasoshosho]] || [[word:thobasokoko|thobasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobasotho|thobasotho]] || [[word:thobasojo|thobasojo]] || [[word:thobasosho|thobasosho]] || [[word:thobasoko|thobasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobasofthof|thobasofthof]] || [[word:thobasofjof|thobasofjof]] || [[word:thobasofshof|thobasofshof]] || [[word:thobasofkof|thobasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobasïfthïf|thobasïfthïf]] || [[word:thobasïfjïf|thobasïfjïf]] || [[word:thobasïfshïf|thobasïfshïf]] || [[word:thobasïfkïf|thobasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobasïfthïfthïf|thobasïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thobasïfjïfjïf|thobasïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thobasïfshïfshïf|thobasïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thobasïfkïfkïf|thobasïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobasïfthïf|thobasïfthïf]] || [[word:thobasïfjïf|thobasïfjïf]] || [[word:thobasïfshïf|thobasïfshïf]] || [[word:thobasïfkïf|thobasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobasïfthïf|thobasïfthïf]] || [[word:thobasïfjïf|thobasïfjïf]] || [[word:thobasïfshïf|thobasïfshïf]] || [[word:thobasïfkïf|thobasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobasæthæ|thobasæthæ]] || [[word:thobasæjæ|thobasæjæ]] || [[word:thobasæshæ|thobasæshæ]] || [[word:thobasækæ|thobasækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobasathatha|thobasathatha]] || [[word:thobasajaja|thobasajaja]] || [[word:thobasashasha|thobasashasha]] || [[word:thobasakaka|thobasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobasatha|thobasatha]] || [[word:thobasaja|thobasaja]] || [[word:thobasasha|thobasasha]] || [[word:thobasaka|thobasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobasafthaf|thobasafthaf]] || [[word:thobasafjaf|thobasafjaf]] || [[word:thobasafshaf|thobasafshaf]] || [[word:thobasafkaf|thobasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thobasasha|thobasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobashësha|thobashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobasrosha|thobasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobasmusha|thobasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobasyasha|thobasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobasnkshësha|gothobasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobasnkrosha|gothobasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobasnkmusha|gothobasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobasnkyasha|gothobasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thobabasasha|thobabasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobabashësha|thobabashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobabasrosha|thobabasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobabasmusha|thobabasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobabasyasha|thobabasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobabasnkshësha|gothobabasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobabasnkrosha|gothobabasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobabasnkmusha|gothobabasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobabasnkyasha|gothobabasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thebæsasha|thebæsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thebæshësha|thebæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thebæsrosha|thebæsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thebæsmusha|thebæsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thebæsyasha|thebæsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothebæsnkshësha|gothebæsnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothebæsnkrosha|gothebæsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothebæsnkmusha|gothebæsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothebæsnkyasha|gothebæsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thobfasasha|thobfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobfashësha|thobfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobfasrosha|thobfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobfasmusha|thobfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobfasyasha|thobfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobfasnkshësha|gothobfasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobfasnkrosha|gothobfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobfasnkmusha|gothobfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobfasnkyasha|gothobfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
